one or more water molecules still violate CementFF4 water contact cutoffs after sanitizer
notes: v2 creates a charge-balanced ZnO2(OH)2 substitutional candidate.
v2 does not use guest_ions/substitute and does not randomly replace Ca-layer atoms.
Zn parameters are taken from CementFF4 supplementary information.
